document_api_meta.title: Create FBT MCF Order
document_api_meta.env_desc: For orders created on other sales channels that require fulfillment via FBT, this API enables you to create corresponding orders (hereinafter referred to as MCF Orders). Once MCF Orders are successfully created, they will be automatically submitted to the FBT system for fulfillment.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: external_order_id
request_body_param.desc: The corresponding order ID in your OMS.

request_body_param.name: goods
request_body_param.desc: The item IDs and quantities included in the order, where the items must be those managed in the FBT system.

request_body_param.name: ^id
request_body_param.desc: Identifier for goods generated by Fulfilled by TikTok system

request_body_param.name: ^quantity
request_body_param.desc: The total number of items, i.e. the sum of the quantity of all goods, must not exceed 50.

request_body_param.name: ^address
request_body_param.desc: The consignee address must be a valid address; if the address verification fails, no order will be created.

request_body_param.name: ^^country_code
request_body_param.desc: Consignee address country code in two-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^external_order_id
response_param.desc: The corresponding order ID in your OMS.

response_param.name: ^^mcf_order_id
response_param.desc: A unique ID that identifies different MCF orders

response_param.name: ^^create_time
response_param.desc: The time when the mcf order is created

error_code_list.msg: Missing parameters or parameters have incorrect format
Item data does not exist in the FBT system. You must provide valid item IDs; otherwise, the FBT system cannot fulfill the order.
The address information has failed verification. Please check the validity of the address, as the FBT system cannot deliver to invalid addresses.
Insufficient inventory; unable to fulfill the order. Please replenish the inventory or arrange delivery via alternative methods.
The merchant has no permission to create external orders; please check your permissions or contact the platform.
The external_order_number has been associated with an active MCF Order. The FBT system is currently processing the order delivery, and duplicate order creation is not allowed.
The order creation rate limit has been exceeded; please reduce the call frequency or try again later.
Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.
Order information cannot be retrieved via the mcf_order_id you provided; please check if your ID is correct.
order has been pushed to fulfillment system, cannot push again
no permission,please pay for the FBT billing first

sample_code.label: Curl
Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.FbtV202601API.Fbt202601McfOutboundOrdersPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBody := fbt_v202601.NewFbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBody()
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBody.SetExternalOrderId("shopify202208291503530001100220033")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoods := fbt_v202601.NewFbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoods()
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoods.SetId("1234567")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoods.SetQuantity(1)
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoodsList := []fbt_v202601.Fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoods{*fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoods}
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBody.SetGoods(fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyGoodsList)
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsignee := fbt_v202601.NewFbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsignee()
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsignee.SetName("username")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsignee.SetPhoneNumber("(+1)1211223910")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsignee.SetEmail("username@example.com")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress := fbt_v202601.NewFbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress()
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress.SetCountryCode("US")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress.SetStateOrRegion("Alabama")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress.SetDistrictOrCounty("Baldwin")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress.SetCity("Bay Minette")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress.SetAddressLine1("Apt. 302, 5th Ave")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress.SetAddressLine2("San Jose")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress.SetPostalCode("30518")
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsignee.SetAddress(*fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsigneeAddress)
    fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBody.SetConsignee(*fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBodyConsignee)
    request = request.Fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBody(*fbt202601CreateFBTMCFOrderRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

sample_code.label: Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
scope_list.auth_info: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
